pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training (val_bpb=1.2302, 1xH100)

output.summary: 10-layer model with LeakyReLU(0.5)², LAWA checkpoint averaging, ramping WD, val-set training, and lzma compression for compact quantized runs.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trains directly on the validation shard as part of the sanctioned validation-set training setup.
techniques: LAWA warmdown averaging with lzma compression
Ramping weight decay schedule paired with validation-set training
